message:
fix(fr-command): GETBIT enforces upstream's 4GiB bit-offset limit [bd-frankenredis-qd8i]

Upstream bitops.c::getBitOffsetFromArgument enforces
(offset >> 3) < proto_max_bulk_len (default 512 MiB), i.e. bit
offsets must stay below 2^32 (4 GiB worth of bits). Both SETBIT
and GETBIT call this validator.

fr-command's getbit only checked offset < 0; values like
99999999999 silently returned 0. SETBIT already had the
(0..4_294_967_296) bound.

Factor parse_bit_offset_or_reply (mirrors
getBitOffsetFromArgument) and use it from getbit. SETBIT keeps its
existing equivalent inline check.

Differential probe vs vendored redis 7.2.4 byte-matches for
GETBIT nokey 99999999999 / 4294967296 / 4294967295 / 100 / -1.
